links.key: bird-栗腹歌鸲-1ecb2d19__distributed_in__loc-布赖恩-霍顿-霍奇森-890821b4
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Indian blue robin (Larvivora brunnea) is a small bird found in the Indian subcontinent

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is migratory, breeding in the forests along the Himalayas of Nepal, India, Myanmar and Bangladesh. They winter in the hill forests of the Western Ghats of India and in Sri Lanka
